Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 31 

BENE_RSDNC_SSA_CNTY_CD 

LABEL: SSA standard county code of the beneficiary’s residence 

DESCRIPTION: This code specifies the Social Security Administration (SSA) code for the county of identified through 
the beneficiary mailing address of the beneficiary. 

SHORT NAME: CNTY_CD 

LONG NAME: BENE_RSDNC_SSA_CNTY_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 3 

SOURCE: NCH 

VALUES: —
